## 复制我的博客

下载

```bash
git clone https://github.com/verylazycat/verylazycat.github.io.git
```

安装依赖

```bash
sudo apt-get install gem
sudo apt-get install ruby-dev
sudo gem install jekyll
sudo gem install jekyll bundler
bundle install
```

编译运行

```bash
bundle exec jekyll serve
```
